message.body: oh I've been waiting for anyone else to mention, I'm free any time for it the show was wonderful
I quite like that last room
this seems like a neat stage, but I am surprised it is higher ranked than echo
I think it's tied with echo
I like that it has a lot of variety
i thought you didnt realize you could doublejump after the dash haha
yeah I also thought that was the problem
yeah my internet went out, im using data rn idk how long ill be around
Holy moly, Kale streaming is nostalgic for me PogChamp
some crazy dodges in that clear
best part of the movie skull no?
the scene where everyone is being tested, unfiltered chills
can you shoot to cancel the fireball?
cattums watched 5 consecutive streams and sparked a watch streak!
the original version was a bit tighter on the timings too
but yeah I agree that the arena fight is the coolest application of the mechanic
yeah i loved this stage, hard tho
damn, I forgot I gave deisgn a 6 lol
everyone has to comment on their familiarity with the inspiration lol
you might get a crash at some point in this stage btw but uh, renex is working on it..
you would have to just switch to another stage in the meantime, but idk if itll happen for him
it's rough having to solve new problems
uploading new build right now with the shotgun crash fix
yeah, I think this gimmick really wants you to be comfortable with the turn around maneuver
new version is up kale, it fixes a bunch of other stuff in upcoming stages too since youve been missing a couple of versions
it fixes at least 7 different crashes lol
if your progress is halted because of this  it is not on us
this stage is totally fine though
tag did you get the preorder in for a kale plushie? they were limited
it's tag's annoying neighbor's chewahwah OhMyDog
i think your control scheme also got in the way of getting accustomed
to me the second half of the platforming was p smooth and intuitive, and not as precise as the first half
i rly liked the one with the fan, the spring one at the start had cool movement, idk in general it was just super fun
yeah I agree with that, though it's not what I focused on I think
I mention it at the end
though I could have praised it more
sagittarius didnt have any revisions, that was how we played it in submissions

most of the saves in the second half have multiple "solutions" to them, its not as open as the platform save but you can take a couple of liberties with the shotgun, the first half is where i really felt the tight and closed spaces
i didnt focus on the reload much, but yeah it made the boss work even better in hindsight
calling it free form is p funny tho lol
grab a brush and put a little make up
what do you mean how do you know if an orb goes up or down?
@PlasmaNapkin this was about you saying "how do you know if an orb goes up or down"
if you make killers with more lenient hitboxes, you probably shouldnt rely on the lenient hitboxes for the jumps to be possible
and yeah i am on board with hitboxes being more lenient if the platforming is actually designed around the shapes communicated to the player
and it just makes it a bit less precise
I have nerfed spike hitboxes by 2 pixels before and noone has ever noticed
i dont think you skipped anything
i think you just made that one jump way too hard
that room has like 50 different ways of doing it
wane hp mode is gonna take like 1 day of work
but yeah balloons is right after
1 day you clear obra dinn, another day wane hp mode, and then balloons?
i thought his color indicates his hp
color of the notes, isn't it
i, too, hue shift when i take damage
just because you killed it way  too fast =P
I'd be curious what you think of what I said
yello DLDC gamers, hows the DLDC gaming
has good mechanical and visual variety
i suggest checking out the original version of the next stage btw, up to you but i think its worth seeing how it goes for you
or maybe we were picked because we didn't make stages? I don't remember the order
nah judges weren't allowed to make submissions
yeah, crypt is the hardest room for me
i think that means 3+ places are wrong already? it usually does in anomaly games like that
oh i see one i think
I guess to make it clear, in the revised version you don't have to pick the anomaly type
This is really random and idk how I ended up down this rabbit hole, but does anyone remember Tehjman1993? Cant find his twitch or whatever if hes even still around lol
every copy of this stage is personalized
@Zeloo tj ghosted the community pretty much
okay so im not making up his existence in my mind  LUL
he didnt really tell anyone where he went
how active is the iwbtg community? compared to 10 yaers ago
Chinese community definitely grew a lot
the community is kinda dispersed compared to how it used to be
I feel like there used to be SO many streamers for it
you can spot it too, surely
i think at least its new?
all the same pots bottom left?
the revised is much easier to handle
might want to read the second monitor
idk how you actually use the room scan
I think that's when you teleport
i saw one up in the trees?
unless it was an anomaly in another attempt
vestibule has the wrong b yeah that
this is a really interesting game
are the cherries fast? maybe that's normal
theres a ton of gold in the gaps
room scan on library could be a play...
the ones i thought were normal
was the crypt entry door in the vestibule always like that?
the time on the clock is also the same
sagittarius ur my debut maker of the year
I wonder if the blocks on gardens are right
wait what did you find there?
the single block moved from right to left
the single block was on the other side i thinkl
it's very fun when you get into it
you need to be pretty patient with learning what it wants you to look for
if youre not open to learning it, it can be frustrating
but i loved that a lot
i mean it is identical to a lot of steam games, i think id give it an 8
Kale, I'm a little upset this grading isn't in a sortable spreadsheet. Just so you know
design is pretty good, the anomalies were decently creative
like spinning the other way etc

theres a couple you didn't get at all, theres paintings that can show up in the vestibule and the door on the left stretches like really high up, sometimes all the paintings in the crypt become just one image, etc
there could have been a bit more whack stuff but it is very solid
I think my design score was mostly just based on how much fun I had
theyre really varied, but some are harder to find than others
atmosphere would be a 10 if not for that ugly church room that kinda ruined it
Did any of you judges play the inspiration beforehand?
Also, want a fun fact, its been 13 years since I've been following along here. Where does the time go eh?
fnaf is like another game on the same sorta vein
in observation duty, do you walk around places?
nah the anomalies etc were creative enough to warrant more than a 5
Could have a fun npc who offers lovely banter while observing
like if that was creativity he would have to deduce points for everyone making a normal platforming stage
always skipping mine... and nader's... and kady's...
yeah, the stage is most fun when you have a pretty good vision of what each room looks like, but still don't have the individual anomalies memorized
dldc should have the boshy cursor that kills you
looks like a surface with a mask and a couple scrolling textures on top of each other
the background tiles are just a darker version of the shader
the areas between the lines are lighter
is that ..a danger spike? it looks like background to me
I was about to ask xd
goin the extra mile for content
i think if you were too slow you would have died
time to steal it for cn4
I think it was just less polished and serious than the rest of the stage
too much of a difficulty fiend...
I think the fact that the fields are "arbitrary" is partially what allowed the maker to make such varied obstacles
but it's always a trade off, personally I always go for consistent gimmicks, but I see why you would go the other way
like, there were a lot of variables in play: speed, angle, if the change was relative or absolute
and it's hard to communicate all of that with a "consistent" gimmick
it's a triple tie I believe
you arent, third is a 3-way tie lmao
theres a three-way tie for 3rd place
this is not revised btw, easy and normal are both difficulties the maker himself implemented on the level
that death effect is a touhou 15 death effect
they home when they get close to an enemy
lol I thought its get diversed on the bamboo
I think you didn't deal damage while standing at the entrance
i'm back! did you update? v1.0.7 crashes constantly on this stage
floogle fixed a 19 year old game maker 8.1 bug for  this one
if it doesn't crash i'll gift 20 subs
I think if you're holding jump it's instant
that bit to the right seems suspicious
I did not know, I was more thinking of a secret above those spikes
you saved us a lot of time...

guy trying to be subtle: can you aim in this stage?
it tells you in the first 5 seconds...
